data.name: SamabakeScramble
data.detailed_description:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

以極致的自創角色功能打造出來的人物編織在一起，

涉及整個小鎮的複雜人際關係網！

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

『夏日假期 交叉路口』是以某個濱海小鎮做為舞台，

讓您可觀察並介入小鎮居民所描繪的人物關係之中，

一款3D社群形成觀察模擬遊戲。

暑假期間，各自計畫打工、與朋友交流、遊玩等活動的角色們。

透過觀察他們，有時操縱他們，逐漸構築社群網。

在此過程中，展開多樣化的人際關係與自由奔放的戀愛模樣。

在玩家未預期的情況下形成的社群網。

不知不覺中，玩家將處於一個後宮境地，所有的居民都愛慕著您。

當您鎖定某位角色時，其他所有人將瞬間成為情敵。

敬請沉浸在行動自主的角色們所編織出的人際關係沼澤當中吧。

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

終極的自創角色系統！

擁有大量髮型及服裝，提供多達10種性格任君挑選！

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

臉部特徵、體型、髮型、服裝、配件等，任意細節皆可自由自在地創作！

創造自己喜愛的獨特角色，編織出魅力四射的社群網吧！

本作品純屬虛構。

作品中出現的人物、組織名稱、地名、事件、時代背景、職業等均屬虛構，與現實完全無關。

此外，登場人物皆為基於當地法規標準的成年人。

本遊戲內容純屬創作。若在現實生活中模仿遊戲內容，可能會牴觸法律並受到制裁。

由於遊戲內容僅為戲劇並純屬虛構，請絕對不要模仿或實行。

data.short_description: 以極致的自創角色功能打造出來的人物編織在一起， 涉及整個小鎮的複雜人際關係網！ 敬請沉浸在行動自主的角色們所編織的人際關係沼澤當中吧。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 10 / 11 (64-bit required)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-8100 serise or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060 Series or AMD Radeon™ RX 480 Series (VRAM 3GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 25 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires an Internet connection.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 10 / 11 (64-bit required)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i7-8700 serise or better
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060 Series or AMD Radeon™ RX 480 Series (VRAM 6GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 25 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires an Internet connection.

data.name: SamabakeScramble
data.detailed_description:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Watch a whole town come alive as characters designed in quite possibly the greatest character creator of all time interact and form—ahem—deep and meaningful relationships!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Samabake Scramble is a thrilling 3D community simulator that takes place in a sunny seaside town.

Enjoy witnessing the passionate relationships that form between the lively members of this idyllic beachside community, then join in the conversations and develop your own unique relationships with the residents of your choice.

Each resident of this little slice of paradise spends their summer vacation in a variety of ways, including working at part-time jobs, chatting with other characters, or hanging out with friends.

Watch and help shape this budding community as it grows and evolves over time.

Witness the rise of all sorts of friendships, romances, and rivalries!

The town has a life of its own, and events will sometimes progress without your direct knowledge or involvement.

A twist of fate could see you surrounded by an adoring harem one day, or locked in a deadly romantic rivalry with half the town's residents the next as you compete for the affections of a special someone.

Each exciting development that arises amongst the cast of lifelike characters promises to be more thrilling than the last!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The ultimate character creation system!

Tweak hairstyles, clothing, and endless other settings to your heart's content, then assign one of more than ten mesmerizing personality types to give each character unique depth!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

No detail is too small!

Customize each and every aspect of a character's facial features, body shape, hairstyle, outfit, accessories, and more.

This game is entirely a work of fiction.

Any names, organizations, locations, or events appearing in this game are fictitious.

Any resemblance to real names, organizations, locations, events, etc. is purely coincidental.

In addition, all characters that appear in this game are adults who comply with the applicable laws and regulations of the region in which this game is played.

The content of this game is a work of fiction.

Attempts to recreate in-game actions or events in real life may be punishable by law.

Please refrain from imitating or playing out scenes depicted in this game.

*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WINDOWS® 10 / 11 (64-bit required)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-8100 serise or better
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060 Series or AMD Radeon™ RX 480 Series (VRAM 3GB) or better
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 25 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Requires an Internet connection.
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WINDOWS® 10 / 11 (64-bit required)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i7-8700 serise or better
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060 Series or AMD Radeon™ RX 480 Series (VRAM 6GB) or better
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 25 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Requires an Internet connection.
